_comment: Copy to <downstream>/.claude/settings.json (git-tracked) to share Bash/Read output caps across the team. Per-developer overrides belong in .claude/settings.local.json (git-ignored). Revisit caps after any model family change — caps generous on an older model become wasteful on a newer one. See PITFALLS.md 2026-04-24 'Model upgrade inflates Bash/Read output tokens'.
